entries.notes: 2026 standard direct rate. Tax-inclusive for Villa La Percha; no separate guest tax line is added on DirectStay. Maintains roughly 20–23% book-direct savings versus updated Airbnb/VRBO comparison records for spring.
2026 summer peak direct rate. Ends Sep 8 after updated Airbnb/VRBO pricing showed the OTA shoulder stepdown beginning around Sep 8–12; keeps direct savings roughly in the 20–22% range during summer.

2026 shoulder-season direct rate through Dec 18. Holiday premium starts Dec 19, where Airbnb/VRBO pricing first reaches true Christmas-week levels; this keeps mid-December mixed stays from losing the book-direct discount.

2026 Christmas/New Year direct rate per Jaimal direction on 2026-05-07. Starts Dec 19 when OTA pricing reaches true Christmas-week levels; intentionally more generous than Airbnb/VRBO peak holiday pricing without giving away the prior $1,700/night level.

2027 peak-season direct rate per Jaimal direction on 2026-05-08 after checking the management-company calendar. Peak season runs Jan 2 through Apr 16 inclusive; keep the full peak window at $2,250/night until Airbnb/VRBO publish 2027 pricing. Tax-inclusive with 7-night minimum.
2027 post-peak spring direct rate after the Jan 2-Apr 16 peak window. Tax-inclusive; 5-night minimum unless owner approval requires otherwise.
2027 summer direct rate projected from the 2026 DirectStay pricing season. Tax-inclusive; 5-night minimum. Revisit once Airbnb/VRBO publish 2027 pricing.
2027 shoulder direct rate projected from the 2026 DirectStay pricing season. Tax-inclusive; 5-night minimum. Revisit once Airbnb/VRBO publish 2027 pricing and Thanksgiving details are confirmed.

2027 Christmas/New Year direct rate projected from the 2026 DirectStay holiday pricing season. Covers 2027 pricing through Dec 31 and ends Jan 1, 2028; tax-inclusive with 5-night minimum until the exact 2027 holiday policy is confirmed.

VRBO calendar-derived current spring rate. Observed May 16-21 at $1,877-$1,897; blocked/blank May dates filled from nearest visible prices and rounded to a clean website record. Effective checkout tax model: VRBO labels Turks & Caicos 12% tax, but May sample tax $1,302 on $13,179.70 displayed subtotal is ~9.88% because tax appears to apply to a lower taxable rent base, not all displayed fees.

VRBO calendar-derived early summer rate. June observed mostly $1,990-$2,031 and July 1-5 around $2,039-$2,042; rounded to one clean summer record. Effective checkout tax model: June sample tax $1,423.80 on $14,146.33 displayed subtotal is ~10.06%; use effective percent on displayed subtotal for comparison.

VRBO calendar-derived mid-summer carry-forward rate. July 6-Aug 7 was blank/blocked in visible calendar; nearest visible prices on both sides were about $2,033-$2,042. Effective checkout tax model: July 4-10 sample tax $1,220.40 on $12,046.14 displayed subtotal is ~10.13%; use for the blocked mid-summer gap.

VRBO calendar-derived late summer rate. August/early September observed around $1,966 weekdays and $2,029-$2,033 weekends; smoothed to $2,000. Effective checkout tax model: blended from Aug 15-22 effective tax 10.25% and Sep 5-12 effective tax 9.99%.

VRBO calendar-derived September stepdown rate. Observed prices decline from about $1,947 to $1,819; smoothed to a short shoulder step. Effective checkout tax model: interpolated from early/late September checkout samples; use ~9.99% on displayed subtotal.

VRBO calendar-derived fall shoulder rate. Observed fall dates cluster around $1,804-$1,858; rounded to $1,825. Effective checkout tax model: Sep 19-26 and Oct 24-31 both show tax $1,302 on $13,094.70 displayed subtotal, ~9.94%.

VRBO calendar-derived blocked-gap rate. Oct 27-Nov 13 was blank/blocked and bracketed by observed fall prices around $1,802-$1,864, so the fall shoulder rate is carried forward. Effective checkout tax model: blended between Oct shoulder sample at ~9.94% and Nov sample at ~10.28%.

VRBO calendar-derived Thanksgiving/early December rate. Observed Nov 14-Dec 14 mostly $1,802-$1,864; rounded to $1,850. Effective checkout tax model: Nov 21-Dec 12 samples cluster around 10.28%-10.35%; use 10.30%.
VRBO observed Dec 15 at $2,179; rounded to $2,175. Effective checkout tax model: use early-December effective rate until holiday checkout sample begins.
VRBO observed Dec 16 at $2,510; rounded to $2,500. Effective checkout tax model: use early-December effective rate until holiday checkout sample begins.
VRBO observed Dec 17 at $2,788; rounded to $2,800. Effective checkout tax model: use early-December effective rate until holiday checkout sample begins.
VRBO observed Dec 18 at $3,081; rounded to $3,075. Effective checkout tax model: bridge between early-December ~10.30% and Christmas-week ~10.54%.

VRBO calendar-derived Christmas/New Year rate. Observed Dec 19-20 at $3,357-$3,410; Dec 21-31 blank/blocked, so year-end is carried at $3,400. Effective checkout tax model: Christmas week sample tax $2,482.08 on $23,555.73 displayed subtotal is ~10.54%.
Airbnb checkout-derived spring rate. May 16-23 sample: 7 nights x $1,844.00 = $12,908.00; taxes $1,518.96; total $14,426.96. Effective tax is ~11.77% of displayed subtotal.
Airbnb checkout-derived summer peak rate. Jun 20-27, Aug 15-22, and Sep 5-12 samples all showed 7 nights x $2,011.43 = $14,080.00; taxes $1,659.60; total $15,739.60.
Airbnb checkout-derived fall shoulder rate. Sep 19-26 and Oct 24-31 samples both showed 7 nights x $1,844.00 = $12,908.00; taxes $1,518.96; total $14,426.96.
Airbnb checkout-derived Thanksgiving week rate. Nov 21-28 sample: 7 nights x $1,847.86 = $12,935.00; taxes $1,522.20; total $14,457.20.
Airbnb checkout-derived early December rate. Dec 5-12 and Dec 12-19 samples both matched $1,844.00/night, $12,908.00 subtotal, $1,518.96 taxes, $14,426.96 total.

Airbnb checkout-derived Christmas week rate. Dec 19-26 sample: 7 nights x $3,466.57 = $24,266.00; taxes $2,881.92; total $27,147.92. Extended through Dec 31 for year-end comparison coverage using the observed Christmas-week Airbnb checkout rate.
